text.title: Retro Facilitation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from the retro instance to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for retro-facilitation-multistyle.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the format choice justified AND do action items carry owner + evidence?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — pick one of 5 supported formats
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Async team + rotating fatigue → anonymous-async chosen with rationale; 1 action item owned by Carol with GitHub issue evidence; next-retro outcome review scheduled → APPROVE.
